description: Lamini provides an enterprise platform for large-language-model inference, tuning, and related agentic pipelines. It offers hosted and self-managed deployment options for building and running customized LLM applications.
summary: Lamini exposes a documented OpenAI-compatible HTTP inference API at `https://api.lamini.ai/inf` and a Python package (`lamini`) as its developer-facing integration surfaces; both use a Lamini-issued API key.
